perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair and a black hoodie smiles at the camera, holding a red paper with the character 'Chun' (Spring). (2) She sits at a wooden table, opens a bottle of dark ink, and dips a yellow beauty sponge into it. (3) Chronological shots show her hands with red glittery nail polish using the sponge to write Chinese characters on square red papers. (4) She holds up the finished papers 'Chun' and 'Man' (Full) with a celebratory 'V' gesture. (5) She attaches the papers to a grey safe and a white cabinet. (6) The final shot shows a close-up of a poorly written large character on red paper next to a smartphone showing a professional reference image, intended as a humorous fail.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced festive Chinese-style music starts with a high-energy female voice speaking in an excited tone. (2) Sound effects like a 'pop' when opening the ink bottle and shimmering 'sparkle' sounds when she shows the results. (3) The background music maintains a consistent tempo throughout the DIY demonstration. (4) The female voice continues to narrate enthusiastically, peaking in volume during the reveal of the finished couplets. (5) Ambient indoor noise is minimal, masked by the BGM.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '新年到了 HAPPY NEW YEAR' - Festive hook. (2) '這是我們的錢箱' (This is our money box) - Functional context. (3) '今天來用美妝蛋寫春聯' (Today, let's write Spring Festival couplets with a beauty sponge) - Title/Hook. (4) '準備的材料有: 美妝蛋, 墨水, 空白春聯' (Prepared materials are: Beauty sponge, ink, blank couplets) - Functional instructions. (5) '滿出來' (Overflowing) - Decorative text appearing with money bag emojis. (6) '翻車現場...' (Fail scene/Accident scene) - Humorous effect text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Tutorial/Process -> Result Reveal -> Humorous Outtake

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 male passerby visible briefly in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a black oversized hoodie and sporting red glittery nail polish.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor office or studio setting with wooden tables, white shelving units filled with figurines/collectors' items, a grey metal safe, and a white cabinet.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a creative and entertaining lifestyle hack for Chinese New Year, demonstrating how to use a common makeup tool (beauty sponge) as a calligraphy brush while maintaining a humorous and relatable persona through a 'fail' ending.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy presentation style, fast-cut editing synced to festive music, and a focus on 'life hacks'.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the Lunar New Year cultural trend to engage viewers with a DIY activity that is both practical and comedic.
